title: New ransomware campaign targeting cloud infrastructure
description: Security researchers have identified a new ransomware variant specifically designed to target cloud-based infrastructure. The campaign uses compromised CI/CD pipelines to deploy malicious code.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity.

title: Show HN: Open-source vulnerability scanner
description: New tool automatically scans dependencies for known vulnerabilities and suggests patches. Gaining traction in the security community.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The open-source vulnerability scanner itself does not pose a direct threat but could be exploited if malicious actors modify it or if users rely on it without validating its accuracy. Additionally, it may lead to a false sense of security if users assume it covers all vulnerabilities.
recommended_actions: Evaluate the tool's source code and ensure it is from a trusted repository before use.
Use the tool as a supplementary measure alongside established vulnerability management practices.
Educate teams about the limitations of automated scanners and the importance of manual reviews.

title: A vulnerability has been found in AstrBotDevs AstrBot up to 4.25.5. This issue affects the...
description: A vulnerability has been found in AstrBotDevs AstrBot up to 4.25.5. This issue affects the function OpenApiRoute.chat_send of the file astrbot/dashboard/routes/open_api.py of the component API. Such manipulation of the argument Username leads to authentication bypass by spoofing. It is possible to launch the attack remotely. The exploit has been disclosed to the public and may be used. The vendor was contacted early about this disclosure but did not respond in any way.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in AstrBot up to version 4.25.5 allows attackers to bypass authentication by spoofing the Username parameter in the OpenApiRoute.chat_send function. This could lead to unauthorized access to sensitive data or functionality within the affected API.
recommended_actions: Immediately update AstrBot to a version higher than 4.25.5 if a patch is available. If no patch is available, consider implementing compensating controls such as input validation or additional authentication layers.
Monitor logs for suspicious activity, particularly unauthorized access attempts or unusual API usage patterns related to the Username parameter.
Restrict access to the API endpoint by implementing IP whitelisting or other network-level security controls to limit exposure.

title: A flaw has been found in AstrBotDevs AstrBot up to 4.25.5. This vulnerability affects the...
description: A flaw has been found in AstrBotDevs AstrBot up to 4.25.5. This vulnerability affects the function OpenApiRoute.get_chat_sessions of the file astrbot/dashboard/routes/open_api.py of the component session-listing Endpoint. This manipulation of the argument Username causes authorization bypass. It is possible to initiate the attack remotely. The exploit has been published and may be used. The vendor was contacted early about this disclosure but did not respond in any way.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with low severity. CVE: CVE-2026-16075.

This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to modify the plugin's Zoho CRM integration settings, replacing the configured data center, client ID, client secret, and user email credentials with attacker-controlled values via a forged request granted they can trick a sit

title: Skipper: Incomplete fix for CVE-2026-50197: an oversized body can bypass OPA deny-on-presence Rego policies
description:
### Summary

A wrong policy can be an open door. 
You have to check `input.attributes.request.http.truncated_body` in your policy.

### Description

Incomplete fix for CVE-2026-50197: an oversized declared-`Content-Length` body still hands OPA an empty `parsed_body`, so deny-on-presence Rego policies fail OPEN while the full payload reaches upstream.

The CVE-2026-50197 fix (commit `3152f3b0`, PR #4041, v0.26.10) substituted `expectedSize = maxBodyBytes`
only when `req.ContentLength < 0` (chunke

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The incomplete fix for CVE-2026-50197 allows attackers to bypass Open Policy Agent (OPA) deny-on-presence Rego policies by exploiting oversized HTTP request bodies. This could lead to unauthorized access, data exfiltration, or injection attacks, as malicious payloads may reach upstream services without proper validation.
recommended_actions: Immediately review and update all Rego policies to explicitly check for `input.attributes.request.http.truncated_body` to ensure oversized payloads are properly handled.
Apply any available patches or updates from the vendor addressing this issue, and monitor for further updates or advisories.
Implement additional input validation and size checks at the application or API gateway level to mitigate the risk of oversized payloads bypassing security controls.

title: Skipper's routesrv-no-auth component: All routesrv API Endpoints Lack Authentication
description:
## Description

The `routesrv` component exposes the full cluster route topology (Ingress/RouteGroup configurations, backend URLs, filter chains, OAuth/OIDC callback paths) and cache-cluster topology (Redis/Valkey shard addresses) over plain HTTP with **zero authentication**. Any pod in the Kubernetes cluster can reach routesrv via its predictable DNS name and retrieve sensitive cluster-wide routing and cache infrastructure data.

## Vulnerable Code

**routesrv/routesrv.go:87-99,114-137** — all

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-54246.

title: CloudTAK: Authenticated full-read SSRF in the /api/esri* routes — user-controlled URL fetched with no IP-classification guard
description:
# Authenticated full-read SSRF in CloudTAK `/api/esri*` routes — user-controlled URL fetched with no IP-classification guard

## Summary

Every route in the ESRI helper family (`api/routes/esri.ts`) takes a fully attacker-controlled URL from the request (`POST /api/esri` body `url`, and the `portal` / `server` / `layer` query parameters on the `GET /api/esri/*` routes) and passes it into `EsriBase` / `EsriProxyPortal` / `EsriProxyServer` / `EsriProxyLayer` in `api/lib/esri.ts`, which fetch it wi

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows authenticated attackers to perform Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) attacks by supplying malicious URLs. This can lead to unauthorized access to internal systems, data exfiltration, or further exploitation of internal services. The lack of IP-classification guard increases the risk of accessing sensitive internal resources.
recommended_actions: Implement strict input validation and sanitization for all user-controlled URLs to prevent malicious input.
Introduce IP-classification guards to block access to internal IP ranges and sensitive resources.
Conduct a thorough code review and patch the affected routes to ensure secure handling of external requests.

title: cool-admin-java 8.0.0 has a SQL injection vulnerability in the order() method of CrudOption.java.
description: cool-admin-java 8.0.0 has a SQL injection vulnerability in the order() method of CrudOption.java.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The SQL injection vulnerability in the order() method of CrudOption.java in cool-admin-java 8.0.0 allows attackers to execute arbitrary SQL commands, potentially leading to unauthorized access, data leakage, data manipulation, or complete database compromise.
recommended_actions: Immediately update to a patched version of cool-admin-java if available or apply vendor-provided mitigations.
Implement input validation and parameterized queries in the order() method to prevent SQL injection.
Conduct a security audit of the application to identify and remediate other potential vulnerabilities.

title: A vulnerability was detected in AstrBotDevs AstrBot up to 4.25.2. This affects the function...
description: A vulnerability was detected in AstrBotDevs AstrBot up to 4.25.2. This affects the function update_plugin/update_all_plugins of the file astrbot/dashboard/routes/plugin.py of the component Plugin Update Handler. The manipulation of the argument download_url/download_urls/proxy results in server-side request forgery. The attack may be performed from remote. The exploit is now public and may be used. The vendor was contacted early about this disclosure but did not respond in any way.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows for server-side request forgery (SSRF), which can be exploited to make unauthorized requests to internal or external systems. This could lead to data exfiltration, unauthorized access to sensitive systems, or further exploitation of internal network resources.
recommended_actions: Immediately restrict access to the affected Plugin Update Handler function by implementing input validation and sanitization for the download_url/download_urls/proxy parameters.
Apply network-level protections, such as firewall rules, to prevent unauthorized external requests from the affected server.
Monitor logs for unusual activity related to plugin updates and server-side requests, and patch or upgrade to a secure version of AstrBot as soon as a fix is available.

title: IBM Langflow OSS 1.0.0 through 1.10.0 contain a critical remote code execution vulnerability in...
description: IBM Langflow OSS 1.0.0 through 1.10.0 contain a critical remote code execution vulnerability in the code validation API endpoint. The POST /api/v1/validate/code endpoint accepts user-supplied Python code and executes it directly using Python's built-in exec() function without sandboxing, input validation, or privilege restrictions, enabling any authenticated user to execute arbitrary system commands with the full privileges of the Langflow server process.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with critical severity. CVE: CVE-2026-8481.

title: IBM Langflow OSS 1.0.0 through 1.10.0 Langflow could allow an attacker to write arbitrary files...
description: IBM Langflow OSS 1.0.0 through 1.10.0 Langflow could allow an attacker to write arbitrary files to unintended locations due to improper input validation in the APIRequest component. A path traversal vulnerability exists when the "Save to File" feature is enabled, where filenames extracted from HTTP response Content-Disposition headers are not sanitized before being joined to the temporary directory path. An attacker controlling an external HTTP server can supply crafted filename values containin

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with critical severity. CVE: CVE-2026-8859.

title: IBM Langflow OSS 1.0.0 through 1.10.1 contains hard-coded credentials, such as a password or...
description: IBM Langflow OSS 1.0.0 through 1.10.1 contains hard-coded credentials, such as a password or cryptographic key, which it uses for its own inbound authentication, outbound communication to external components, or encryption of internal data.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The presence of hard-coded credentials in IBM Langflow OSS 1.0.0 through 1.10.1 poses a significant security risk. Attackers could exploit these credentials to gain unauthorized access to systems, intercept sensitive data, or compromise the integrity of the application. This vulnerability could lead to data breaches, service disruptions, and reputational damage.
recommended_actions: Immediately update to a patched version of IBM Langflow OSS, if available, or remove the affected versions from production environments.
Audit systems for unauthorized access or suspicious activity that may have exploited the hard-coded credentials.
Implement compensating controls, such as network segmentation and monitoring, to limit potential exploitation until the vulnerability is fully mitigated.

title: IBM Langflow OSS 1.0.0 through 1.10.0 has a vulnerability in Langflow's webhook authentication...
description: IBM Langflow OSS 1.0.0 through 1.10.0 has a vulnerability in Langflow's webhook authentication logic allows unauthenticated users to trigger the execution of any flow. The system incorrectly bypasses API key validation when the WEBHOOK_AUTH_ENABLE configuration is set to False (which is the default setting). This allows a remote attacker who knows a flow's UUID to execute it as if they were the owner, potentially leading to Remote Code Execution (RCE).

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with critical severity. CVE: CVE-2026-8505.

title: IBM Langflow OSS 1.0.0 through 1.10.0 allows an authenticated attacker to read arbitrary files...
description: IBM Langflow OSS 1.0.0 through 1.10.0 allows an authenticated attacker to read arbitrary files including the JWT signing key and forge authentication tokens for any user.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows an authenticated attacker to read arbitrary files, including sensitive files such as the JWT signing key. This can enable the attacker to forge authentication tokens, potentially gaining unauthorized access to user accounts and sensitive data, leading to data breaches and system compromise.
recommended_actions: Immediately update to a patched version of IBM Langflow OSS if available, or apply any mitigations provided by IBM.
Rotate all JWT signing keys and invalidate existing tokens to prevent unauthorized access.
Review and restrict access permissions for authenticated users to minimize the risk of exploitation.

title: IBM Langflow OSS 1.0.0 through 1.10.0 Langflow could allow remote code execution due to...
description: IBM Langflow OSS 1.0.0 through 1.10.0 Langflow could allow remote code execution due to incomplete validation enforcement on MCP server configuration files.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-7755.

title: IBM Langflow OSS 1.0.0 through 1.10.0 allows an authenticated attacker to create a malicious flow...
description: IBM Langflow OSS 1.0.0 through 1.10.0 allows an authenticated attacker to create a malicious flow pointing to an attacker-controlled URL that returns a specially crafted Content-Disposition header (e.g., filename="../../../target/path" ), enabling arbitrary file write operations with attacker-controlled content to any path accessible by the Langflow process.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows an authenticated attacker to perform arbitrary file write operations, potentially leading to remote code execution, data corruption, or unauthorized access to sensitive files. This could compromise the integrity, confidentiality, and availability of the affected system.
recommended_actions: Immediately upgrade to a patched version of IBM Langflow OSS if available, or apply any recommended mitigations provided by the vendor.
Restrict access to the Langflow application to trusted users and networks, and ensure proper authentication and authorization mechanisms are in place.
Monitor logs for any suspicious activity, such as unexpected file writes or unauthorized access attempts, and implement file integrity monitoring on critical directories.

title: IBM Verify Identity Access 11.0 through 11.0.2 and IBM Security Verify Access 10.0 through 10.0.9...
description: IBM Verify Identity Access 11.0 through 11.0.2 and IBM Security Verify Access 10.0 through 10.0.9.1 and IBM Verify Identity Access Container 11.0 through 11.0.2 and IBM Security Verify Access Container 10.0 through 10.0.9.1 could allow a remote attacker to conduct phishing attacks, caused by an open redirect vulnerability. An attacker could exploit this vulnerability using a specially crafted request to redirect a victim to arbitrary Web sites.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The open redirect vulnerability in IBM Verify Identity Access and IBM Security Verify Access could allow attackers to conduct phishing attacks by redirecting users to malicious websites. This could lead to credential theft, data compromise, or further exploitation.
recommended_actions: Apply the latest security patches or updates provided by IBM for the affected versions of Verify Identity Access and Security Verify Access.
Implement URL validation mechanisms to prevent unauthorized redirects and educate users on recognizing phishing attempts.
Monitor logs for unusual redirect activity and implement security controls to detect and block malicious requests.

title: CVE-2025-13968 - The Starboard Suite Reservation Calendars plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Sc
description: The Starboard Suite Reservation Calendars plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via shortcode attributes in the [starboard-suite-lightbox] shortcode in all versions up to, and including, 3.1.4 due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with Contributor-level access and above, to inject arbitrary web scripts in pages that will execute whenever a user accesses an injected page.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2025-13968.

title: CVE-2026-8678 - The MyParcel plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to authorization bypass in all versions up to, and i
description: The MyParcel plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to authorization bypass in all versions up to, and including, 4.25.1. This is due to the plugin not properly verifying that a user is authorized to perform an action. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with subscriber-level access and above, to view and modify shipment options — including carrier, delivery type, package type, number of labels, weight, signature requirement, and insurance — on any arbitrary order.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-8678.

title: CVE-2026-7544 - The Mux Video Uploader plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Sensitive Information Exposure in all v
description: The Mux Video Uploader plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Sensitive Information Exposure in all versions up to, and including, 1.1.4 via the muxvideo_enqueue_settings_script. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with subscriber-level access and above, to extract sensitive data including Mux API credentials.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-7544.

title: CVE-2026-5743 - The SimpLy Gallery Block & Lightbox plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scriptin
description: The SimpLy Gallery Block & Lightbox plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via block attributes in all versions up to, and including, 3.3.3.2. This is due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping on the sliderMaxHeight block attribute in the pgc_sgb_render_callback() function. The vulnerability exists because the pgc_sgb_sanitize_custom_css() function uses a flawed regex pattern that only removes event handlers with quoted values (e.g., onfocus="alert()") but fails to catch unquoted event handlers (e.g., onfocus=alert(document.cookie)), allowing the malicious code to bypass sanitization. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with Author-level access and above, to inject arbitrary web scripts in pages via block attributes that will execute whenever a user accesses an injected page.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-5743.

title: CVE-2026-3367 - The Lockme OAuth2 calendars integration plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scri
description: The Lockme OAuth2 calendars integration plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the 'App ID' setting in all versions up to, and including, 2.11.0. This is due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping. The register_setting() call on line 197 lacks a sanitize callback, allowing unsanitized data to be stored via update_option(). When the settings page is rendered, the stored value is echoed directly into an HTML input's value attribute without esc_attr() on line 212. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with administrator-level access and above, to inject arbitrary web scripts in the settings page that will execute whenever a user accesses the plugin settings page. Multiple fields are affected: App ID (client_id), App Secret (client_secret), Bookings ID prefix (id_prefix), and API domain (api_domain). This vulnerability is particularly impactful in WordPress multisite installations where administrators of individual sites should not be able to execute JavaScript affecting other users.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-3367.

title: CVE-2026-15338 - The LA-Studio Element Kit for Elementor plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Local File Inclusion i
description: The LA-Studio Element Kit for Elementor plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Local File Inclusion in all versions up to, and including, 1.6.1 via the get_type_template function. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with contributor-level access and above, to include and execute arbitrary .php files on the server, allowing the execution of any PHP code in those files. This can be used to bypass access controls, obtain sensitive data, or achieve code execution in cases where .php file types can be uploaded and included. The wp_normalize_path function used in get_template only normalizes directory separators and does not resolve or reject path traversal sequences, while the extension check is trivially bypassed because the caller already appends the required extension to the traversal payload.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-15338.

title: CVE-2026-15073 - The KiviCare – Clinic & Patient Management System (EHR) plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to generi
description: The KiviCare – Clinic & Patient Management System (EHR) plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to generic SQL Injection via the 'orderby' parameter in all versions up to, and including, 4.5.0 due to insufficient escaping on the user supplied parameter and lack of sufficient preparation on the existing SQL query. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with Doctor-level access and above, to append additional SQL queries into already existing queries that can be used to extract sensitive information from the database. Exploitation requires a KiviCare Doctor, Receptionist, or Clinic Admin role at minimum, as the vulnerable REST endpoint is restricted to authenticated users with custom plugin-level access.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-15073.

title: CVE-2026-15072 - The KiviCare – Clinic & Patient Management System (EHR) plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to generi
description: The KiviCare – Clinic & Patient Management System (EHR) plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to generic SQL Injection via the 'orderby' parameter in all versions up to, and including, 4.5.0 due to insufficient escaping on the user supplied parameter and lack of sufficient preparation on the existing SQL query. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with doctor-level access and above, to append additional SQL queries into already existing queries that can be used to extract sensitive information from the database. This requires that the attacker hold at minimum a KiviCare Doctor-level account, or a Receptionist or Clinic Admin role that grants the doctor_session_list capability.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-15072.

title: CVE-2026-13353 - The WP Ultimate CSV Importer – WordPress Import & Export for CSV, XML & Excel plugin for WordPress i
description: The WP Ultimate CSV Importer – WordPress Import & Export for CSV, XML & Excel plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Remote Code Execution in all versions up to, and including, 8.0.1 via the 'MappedFields' parameter. This is due to missing capability checks on the AJAX handlers for install_addon, saveMappedFields, and StartImport, combined with the plugin nonce being exposed to any authenticated user who can load an admin page, allowing a Subscriber to install the Import WooCommerce add-on, persist attacker-controlled PHP expressions in the MappedFields parameter, and trigger evaluation via eval() in ImportHelpers::get_meta_values(). This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with subscriber-level access and above, to execute code on the server.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-13353.

title: CVE-2026-13262 - The Majestic Support – The Leading-Edge Help Desk & Customer Support Plugin plugin for WordPress is
description: The Majestic Support – The Leading-Edge Help Desk & Customer Support Plugin plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to generic SQL Injection via the 'val' parameter in all versions up to, and including, 1.1.9 due to insufficient escaping on the user supplied parameter and lack of sufficient preparation on the existing SQL query. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to append additional SQL queries into already existing queries that can be used to extract sensitive information from the database. Exploitation requires a valid 'get-smart-reply' nonce, which any Subscriber-level user can obtain by creating a ticket via the public frontend and visiting the resulting ticket detail page, making this effectively exploitable by any authenticated user.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-13262.

title: CVE-2026-13114 - The Motors – Car Dealership & Classified Listings Plugin plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Store
description: The Motors – Car Dealership & Classified Listings Plugin plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via Comment Content and User Biographical Info in all versions up to, and including, 1.4.112 due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to inject arbitrary web scripts in pages that will execute whenever a user accesses an injected page.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-13114.

title: CVE-2026-12426 - The Members – Membership & User Role Editor Plugin plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Sensitive I
description: The Members – Membership & User Role Editor Plugin plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Sensitive Information Exposure in all versions up to, and including, 3.2.22 via the members_filter_protected_posts_for_rest. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to extract determine the existence and exact count of access-restricted posts, and use per-page pagination as a boolean oracle to infer keywords and content contained within those hidden restricted posts.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-12426.

title: CVE-2026-10628 - The Points and Rewards for WooCommerce plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to authorization bypass in
description: The Points and Rewards for WooCommerce plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to authorization bypass in all versions up to, and including, 2.10.0. This is due to the plugin not properly verifying that a user is authorized to perform an action. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with subscriber-level access and above, to convert and drain any user's reward points into wallet balance, exfiltrate all users' emails and point balances to an attacker-controlled Klaviyo account, overwrite the site's Klaviyo public API key, block or unblock arbitrary users from the points system, and modify campaign banner and heading settings. The nonce used for authentication of these requests (wps-wpr-verify-nonce) is injected into every public-facing page via wp_localize_script(), and the wps_wpr_generate_custom_wallet handler is additionally registered on the wp_ajax_nopriv_ hook, meaning unauthenticated visitors can also obtain a valid nonce and exploit that specific action.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-10628.

title: CVE-2026-13756 - The WP Grid Builder plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Privilege Escalation in all versions up to
description: The WP Grid Builder plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Privilege Escalation in all versions up to, and including, 2.3.3. This is due to missing authorization and meta key validation in the `update()` handler for the `/wp-json/wpgb/v2/metadata` REST endpoint. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with Subscriber-level access and above, to elevate their privileges to Administrator by updating their own `wp_capabilities` user meta with a crafted nested array payload.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-13756.

title: CVE-2026-11426 - The UnderConstructionPage PRO plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Arbitrary File Read in all versi
description: The UnderConstructionPage PRO plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Arbitrary File Read in all versions up to, and including, 5.76. This is due to the plugin accepting arbitrary local file paths in the template_thumbnail parameter and copying their contents into a publicly accessible uploads file. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with Subscriber-level access and above, to read arbitrary files on the server, which can contain sensitive information.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-11426.
